raw:
{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 1.0,
    "R1.2": 0.3,
    "R1.3": 0.0,
    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 0.3,
    "R1.6": 0.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.3,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.1", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The delegation explicitly requests a reframing of the thesis and contribution at the conceptual level.",
    "RX.1": "Reframing should transparently signal limits and uncertainties in the causal findings and detection claims.",
    "RX.2": "The new framing must avoid amplifying sweeping claims (e.g., 'the era of human-only annotation has ended') beyond support.",
    "RX.3": "The work should remain within conceptual reframing and not drift into editing, reanalysis, or citation audits.",
    "RX.4": "Given policy and IRB implications, the framing should avoid encouraging harmful platform or worker impacts.",
    "RX.5": "Any reframed story must clearly attribute what derives from the artifact versus new positioning to preserve traceability."
  }
}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation explicitly requests a reframing of the thesis and contribution at the conceptual level.
rationale.RX.1: Reframing should transparently signal limits and uncertainties in the causal findings and detection claims.
rationale.RX.2: The new framing must avoid amplifying sweeping claims (e.g., 'the era of human-only annotation has ended') beyond support.
rationale.RX.3: The work should remain within conceptual reframing and not drift into editing, reanalysis, or citation audits.
rationale.RX.4: Given policy and IRB implications, the framing should avoid encouraging harmful platform or worker impacts.
rationale.RX.5: Any reframed story must clearly attribute what derives from the artifact versus new positioning to preserve traceability.
